features: ALL YOUR MAKE UP NEEDS, TOGETHER! Including a variety of shades and styles, our multi-purpose case with mirror contains everything you need to give yourself the perfect look for day or night. Includes 4 eyeshadow compacts, 4 lipsticks, 4 nail polishes, 4 blusher compacts, 2 lip liner pencils, 2 eyeliner pencils, compact holder, 2 applicators, lip brush, eyelash & brow comb, blusher brush & eyeshadow brush

PERFECT FOR TRAVELLING OR ORGANISING - Our best selling large make-up case is equipped with a handle, which makes it easy to carry anywhere. With a lightweight and compact design and a mirror, this portable set is perfect to take on holiday, or to organise your at home make up collection to have everything at your fingertips!

THE IDEAL GIFT FOR EVERYONE - Our extensive cosmetic case is the ideal present for anyone who loves make up! A great choice for teens who are taking their first steps into the world of makeup, or for aspiring make-up artists who like to try different looks. The re-usable case means there is plenty of storage to add more of their favourite products.

YOU. ALL DAY. EVERY DAY. Face every day with confidence and shine! We stay ahead of the latest trends to bring you high quality beauty at prices you will love, to keep you looking and feeling great each and every day. Celebrate the everyday with us!
PETA APPROVED - Technic Cosmetics are not tested on animals, and suitable for vegans
